general.name: lvm_dapall
general.short: Summary table of LVM DR20 DAP products and exposure-averaged spectral properties.
general.description: The file `dapall-{drpver}-{dapver}.fits` is a summary of the dataproducts produced by the LVM DAP analysis for the delivered exposures included in SDSS-V DR20. It comprises a binary table in which each row corresponds to an individual exposure identified by `tileid`, `mjd`, and `expnum`, together with the corresponding DAP file, and contains observational and physical properties derived from stellar-continuum fitting and emission-line measurements of the observed spectra. Fluxes listed in this file are average values within the field of view of the science IFU and are reported in units of 10^-16 erg/s/cm^2 measured in one fiber area, where each fiber area corresponds to 0.2718 arcmin^2. The table combines basic observational metadata with stellar population parameters and flux measurements of key emission lines across the optical and near-infrared range, including Balmer lines, [O II], [O III], [N II], [S II], and [S III].

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

hdu0.name: PRIMARY
hdu0.description: Primary HDU containing no data array and header keywords describing the DRP and DAP versions, release tag, and file creation date.

hdu1.name: DAPALL_DR20
hdu1.description: Binary table containing one row per delivered DR20 exposure with identifiers, exposure metadata, exposure-averaged stellar-continuum parameters, fit-quality metrics, and parametric emission-line fluxes with uncertainties. Fluxes are average values within the field of view of the science IFU and are reported in units of 10^-16 erg/s/cm^2 measured in one fiber area, where each fiber area corresponds to 0.2718 arcmin^2.

mjd.name: mjd
mjd.description: Modified Julian Date of the observation

dapfile.name: dapfile
dapfile.description: Name of the associated DAP output file

flux_st.name: flux_st
flux_st.description: Average stellar flux within the field of view of the science IFU, reported in units measured in one fiber area.

med_flux_st.name: med_flux_st
med_flux_st.description: Median stellar flux at the V-band within the field of view of the science IFU, reported in units measured in one fiber area.

e_med_flux_st.name: e_med_flux_st
e_med_flux_st.description: Uncertainty in the median stellar flux at the V-band within the field of view of the science IFU, reported in units measured in one fiber area.
